name: SuperClaw Automation
description: Telegram 智能操控介面 — Dashboard, Workflow, Agent 管理, Cron 排程, DevOps 整合

telegramAdminIds.description: Telegram user IDs allowed to use admin functions

telegramAdminIds.label: Admin User IDs
telegramAdminIds.help: Telegram numeric user IDs that can access admin-only functions (agent switch, reset, deploy).

notificationLevel.label: Notification Level
notificationLevel.help: Controls how aggressively the bot sends notifications. silent = edit dashboard only, quiet = new message no sound, loud = with sound.

dashboardAutoRefreshMs.label: Dashboard Refresh
dashboardAutoRefreshMs.help: How often the living dashboard auto-refreshes in milliseconds.

rateLimit.label: Rate Limiting
rateLimit.help: Action rate limits to prevent accidental spam.

security.label: Security Patterns
security.help: Keyword patterns for auto-approve and require-confirm actions.
